message:
fix(extensions): eliminate O(N^2) string concatenations in polyfills

Replaces naive `+= String.fromCharCode(bytes[i])` loops in the JS polyfills for:
- `__pi_fetch_body_bytes_to_base64`
- `__pi_http_chunks_to_base64`
- `Buffer.prototype.toString("base64")`
- `crypto.subtle.digest`
- `TextDecoder.prototype.decode`

These loops previously exhibited O(N^2) time complexity due to string immutability/copying, causing severe performance degradation, memory exhaustion, and potential timeouts when processing large binary payloads (e.g. multi-megabyte file uploads or HTTP responses). They now use a chunked `String.fromCharCode.apply()` strategy with 8192-byte windows, bringing them down to O(N) complexity.
